scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,landing -c 'blue,magenta' "bun run dev:web" "bun run dev:landing"
scripts.test:: bun run test:web && bun run test:db
scripts.test:all: bun run test:web && bun run test:db && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: ./scripts/run-with-nix-if-available.sh env PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1 bun run --cwd apps/web test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:headed: ./scripts/run-with-nix-if-available.sh env PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1 bun run --cwd apps/web test:e2e:headed
scripts.check:db: sh -c 'if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python -m compileall tools/netflow-db; else exec python3 -m compileall tools/netflow-db; fi'
